'''Dor Nameth''' was a distant [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Brangus Glee}}</ref> located in the [[Dor Nameth system/Legends|Dor Nameth system]],<ref name="TEA" /> a part of the [[Bright Jewel sector/Legends|Bright Jewel sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> The planet was situated on the [[Celanon Spur/Legends|Celanon Spur]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which connected it to the [[Qiilura system|Qiilura]] and [[Korvaii system/Legends|Korvaii systems]].<ref name="EGTW" /> Dor Nameth was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Brangus Glee]], an elder of a [[Brangus Glee's species/Legends|dexterous species]] of renowned travelers.<ref name="CCG" /> By [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], the planet fell within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dor Nameth was created for a card of the [[1998]] ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Dor Nameth [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thus Dor Nameth itself, in grid square L-7.<ref name="TEA" />
